name: e2e-test-builder
description: Athena CLI runs this authored Playwright E2E workflow across sessions — analyze setup, explore the live product, plan coverage, generate and review specs, write and review tests, then execute and stabilize them
examplePrompts: Add E2E tests for the login and signup flows at https://myapp.com
Build Playwright coverage for the checkout process
Write E2E tests for the dashboard and settings pages
